badge_full_footer: No AI algorithm was used in this creative process
bloc_signature:
Declaration: [TCP/UP: HUC] (Human Content)
> Substance: human | Form: human
> No AI was used in this creation process
sidebar_download_call: Need a Black & White variant or specific format?
sidebar_disclaimer: TCP/UP is a declarative protocol. The displayed label corresponds to the author's self-declaration about their creation process
philosophy_quote: "100% organic. No algorithmic interface filtered my thinking."
definition_text: This content is declared as human in origin. No AI tool was used for generating ideas, structuring, or formatting.
usecase_text: Pure artistic creation, intimate narratives, sensitive strategic decisions, opinion pieces, personal essays, raw expertise, literary manuscript, etc.
example1_text: A manuscript written entirely without software assistance.
example2_text: An opinion editorial where every word is chosen for its emotional impact.
example3_text: A motivation letter or thank-you note handwritten or typed without assistance.
example4_text: A digital drawing created freehand on a tablet (without AI filters).
edgecase1_title: "I used a built-in spell checker in my word processor. Is it HUC?"
edgecase1_text: No. Even standard spell checkers are forms of light AI. If you enable automatic correction, move to HCA. HUC requires total absence of algorithmic assistance.
edgecase2_title: "I searched for a quote on Google. Is it HUC?"
edgecase2_text: Yes. Using a search engine to find a source doesn't alter the human origin of the content you produce afterwards. The distinction concerns generation or modification of the content itself.
edgecase3_title: "I used a paper thesaurus. Is it HUC?"
edgecase3_text: Yes. HUC concerns the absence of algorithmic tools in the content production chain. A paper dictionary (or a manually consulted digital one) is not AI-generative or AI-corrective assistance.
edgecases_more_info: More details on critical cases and arbitration here
noprompt1_text: No prompt is used. The author refuses any generative or corrective interface to preserve raw authenticity.
noprompt2_text: Use is limited to standard word processing software like a notepad.
